Analyzed SuiteCRM source code (modules/ACLActions/actiondefs.php) showing define('ACL_ALLOW_NONE', -99), which correctly corresponds to the 'None' setting required by the task for the Accounts module permissions.

privileged_info_summary: The required user is synthetic (Marcus Chen, marcus.chen@pnwindustrial.com, username mchen) and must be created as Active and assigned the 'Field Sales Rep' role. Analysis of SuiteCRM's internal source code reveals that setting a permission to 'None' (as requested for the Accounts module) corresponds to an ACL override value of -99 in the database.
